meta_title: AskBiz Pricing — Free to Start. Phone POS from £5/month.
meta_description: Free to start, no card needed. Phone POS from £5/seat with M-Pesa, MTN & Airtel built in. Business tracker from £19/month. Cancel anytime, no setup fees.
og_title: AskBiz Pricing — Sell With Your Phone From Day One
og_description: Free plan available. Phone POS from £5/seat/month — M-Pesa, cash, card, camera scan. Business tracker from £19/month. No hardware, no hidden costs.
subtitle: Connect your first data source and ask your first questions for free. Upgrade when you need more.
plan_free_desc: 10 questions a month. Upload your data, get your Business Pulse score, explore the tools — no card needed.
plan_free_feat_4: FX Risk, Landed Cost & Export Tools
plan_growth_desc: Unlimited questions, all tools pre-filled from your data, Daily Brief, social commerce, churn intelligence, market intelligence.
plan_growth_feat_1: All tools pre-filled from your data
plan_business_desc: Everything in Growth plus team seats, Decision Memory, Competitor Watch, CFO Mode, and priority support.
addon_desc: A full point-of-sale system connected to your AskBiz intelligence. Each seat is a cashier or manager login.
addon_feat_register_d: Barcode scanning, split payments, refunds, digital receipts
addon_feat_inventory_d: Real-time stock, low-stock alerts, AI reorder suggestions
addon_feat_branch_d: Per-location inventory, staff, reporting, tax settings
addon_feat_staff_d: OTP login, shift open/close, per-cashier performance
enterprise_desc: Custom data sources, SSO, dedicated infrastructure, SLA, and volume pricing for teams of 20+
inc_dashboards_d: Revenue, margin, cash flow — ready the moment you connect
inc_ai_d: Ask questions about your business in plain English
inc_brief_d: Plain-English morning summary of your most important metrics
inc_anomaly_d: Get notified when something unusual happens in your data
inc_price_d: Find which products can sustain a price increase
inc_social_d: TikTok Shop, Instagram, and Pinterest tracking
inc_supplier_d: Auto-graded scorecards, negotiation briefs, delay cost analysis
inc_landed_d: Import cost breakdowns with duty, VAT, shipping and FX hedging
inc_cfo_d: Board-ready P&L, cash runway, margin analysis
inc_whatsapp_d: Browse, order, and updates via WhatsApp — fully integrated
inc_pos_d: Full register, inventory, multi-branch, staff shifts
inc_residency_d: Your data stays in the UK. GDPR compliant by design
faq_0_q: Is the Free plan really free forever?
faq_0_a: Yes — the Free plan is free forever with no credit card required. You get 10 questions per month, CSV/Excel uploads, Business Pulse score, and the ability to connect Shopify, Amazon, and more.
faq_1_q: What's the difference between Growth and Business?
faq_1_a: Growth (£19/month) gives you unlimited questions and all the AI-powered tools pre-filled from your data. Business (£39/month) adds team seats for up to 5 members, Decision Memory, Competitor Watch, CFO Mode with board-ready reports, and priority support.
faq_2_a: Yes. Cancel anytime from your account settings. If you cancel a paid subscription, you keep access until the end of your billing period. You'll drop back to the Free plan automatically.
faq_3_a: Yes — pay annually and get 2 months free (equivalent to ~17% off). Switch to annual billing at any time from your account settings.
faq_4_q: What happens to my data if I cancel?
faq_4_a: Your data is retained for 30 days after cancellation, during which you can export everything. After 30 days, your data is permanently deleted.
faq_5_q: Do you offer discounts for startups or nonprofits?
faq_5_a: Yes — we offer discounts for qualifying early-stage startups and registered charities. Contact us via the Help Centre to apply.
faq_6_q: How does Point of Sale pricing work?
faq_6_a: The PoS is a £5/seat/month add-on available on any plan. Each seat is one cashier or manager login. You get a full register with barcode scanning, inventory management, multi-branch support, staff shifts, tax compliance, GDPR tools, and Xero/QuickBooks sync.
guarantee_desc: Try any paid plan completely risk-free. If AskBiz doesn't save you time in the first 14 days, email us and we'll refund you in full — no questions asked.
cta_desc: No credit card required. Connect your first data source in under 10 minutes.
footer_copy: © 2026 AskBiz Ltd. Prices shown in GBP, excluding VAT.
